zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clifford於大約1363年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford31歲，母親Maud de Beauchamp29歲。他於1387年與Elizabeth de Ros在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德布盧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國維斯特莫藍德被列為sheriff of westmorland。他去世於1391年8月18日在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年29歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clifford于大约1363年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，他的父亲Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford31岁，母亲Maud de Beauchamp29岁。他于1387年与Elizabeth de Ros在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德布盧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国維斯特莫藍德被列为sheriff of westmorland。他去世于1391年8月18日在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年29岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比。

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clifford was born about 1363, in Westmorland, England, his father, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, was 31 and his mother, Maud de Beauchamp, was 29. He married Elizabeth de Ros in 1387, in Brough, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England. He died on 18 August 1391, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Appleby, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clifford est né environ 1363, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud de Beauchamp, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Ros en 1387, à Brough, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of westmorland à Westmorland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 18 août 1391, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clifford um 1363 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford 31 und seine Mutter Maud de Beauchamp 29. Er hat 1387 in Brough, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Ros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of westmorland in Westmorland, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. August 1391 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Appleby, Westmorland, England und wurde in Appleby, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clifford è nato il circa 1363 nel Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Beauchamp, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Ros nel 1387, nel Brough, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of westmorland nel Westmorland, England. Morì il 18 agosto 1391, nel Appleby, Westmorland, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Appleby, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cliffordが約1363年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Cliffordは31歳，母Maud de Beauchampは29歳であった。1387年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドブロウでElizabeth de Rosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスウエストモーランドでの職業はsheriff of westmorlandと記録されている。彼は1391年8月18日にイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで29歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clifford(이)가 대략 1363년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Beauchamp(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 브루그h에서 Elizabeth de Ros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 sheriff of westmorland이었다. 그는 1391년 8월 18일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에 묻혔다.

pt.from 6 December 1389 to 7 September 1391: de 6 de dezembro de 1389 a 7 de setembro de 1391
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clifford nasceu aproximadamente 1363, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Beauchamp, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Ros em 1387, em Brough, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of westmorland em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1391, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clifford родился около 1363 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Beauchamp, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Ros в 1387 г. в местности броую, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of westmorland в местности вестморланд, Англия. Он умер 18 августа 1391 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Clifford nació aproximadamente 1363, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Clifford 2nd Baron Clifford, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud de Beauchamp, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Ros en 1387, en Brough, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of westmorland en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1391, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
